title: The Earth-Twin with an Atmosphere!

scenes.text: One Earth-like exoplanet has an atmosphere!
This new exoplanet, identified as K2-18 b, is about 120 light-years away and shows signs of water vapor.
Could this be our future home?
scenes.label: EXOPLANET POTENTIAL

scenes.text: Follow to feed your curious mind daily.

description: K2-18 b is the first Earth-like exoplanet confirmed to have an atmosphere. This discovery could change our understanding of habitable worlds. Follow for daily science!
